message:
feat(fp-index): add MultiIndex.duplicated/is_unique parity (frankenpandas-7zzl)

Adds MultiIndex::duplicated(keep) covering pandas' keep='first' /
'last' / False modes on composite tuples, plus is_unique and
has_duplicates properties. Uses hashmap bookkeeping to avoid repeated
scans. Composite tuples that appear once are never marked duplicated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
